title: Bin
description: Simplify item disposal with a dedicated in-game trash bin!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

Bin is a lightweight yet highly practical plugin designed to offer players a dedicated inventory interface for easily discarding unwanted items. Using a custom bin inventory, players can organize and maintain their inventories by quickly disposing of junk items in just a few clicks. Note: The Bin plugin requires the AshLib library to function properly. [Make sure to download and install AshLib before using Bin.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/30) [More detailed description here.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/31)


Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
